---
title: "livefigures template"
filters:
  - at: pre-ast
    path: livefigures
---

Reference an editable figure source with normal Quarto image syntax —
`![](figures/diagram.excalidraw)` — or write small diagrams inline as
fenced blocks. This template uses inline blocks so it renders with no
extra files (Node ≥ 18 required):

See @fig-pipeline and @fig-graph.

```{.nomnoml #fig-pipeline fig-cap="Sources render at build time"}
#direction: right
[edit source] -> [quarto render]
[quarto render] -> [figure]
```

```{.dot #fig-graph fig-cap="Graphviz works too — 18 formats in all"}
digraph {
  rankdir=LR;
  node [shape=box, style=rounded];
  excalidraw -> livefigures;
  "vega-lite" -> livefigures;
  plantuml -> livefigures;
  livefigures -> {HTML PDF slides};
}
```

Full documentation: <https://livefigures.seandavis.net>
